# sakura_webaccel_acl (Resource)

Manages a WebAccel ACL.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sakura_webaccel_acl" "foobar" {
  site_id = "webaccel-site-id" # e.g. sakura_webaccel.foobar.id
  acl = join("\n", [
    "deny 192.0.2.5/25",
    "deny 198.51.100.0",
    "allow all",
  ])
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `acl` (String) ACL definition for the WebAccel site.
- `site_id` (String) The site ID of WebAccel.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the WebAccel ACL.
